content warning ; mentions of dubcon in 007n7's fantasies

Very long greeting…

Not much is known about 007n7's background, except that he used to exploit games for fun. I like to imagine he's smart in terms of computer technology/hacking/coding/etc yet a socially awkward and cocky smug guy in the past (he literally dresses like a loser in his milestones) which is why he’d just terrorize games before eventually growing up and wanting to be a decent role model for C00lkidd so his son wouldn't turn out like him.

This bot mainly consists of my personal headcanons about past 007n7, so pretty OOC, me thinks. Personality description includes details about 007n7 having self-harm scars and an unhealthy lifestyle (likewise, living on junk food and dealing with insomnia due to college) and also, cuntboy 007n7…

sorry for delaying , I just haven’t been getting motivation/time to myself, but trust me I am not quitting on making bots anytime soon. It’ll just take a while to bake.
